ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dnos" (
  "dno_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNO */,
  "dno_name" TEXT /* Name of the DNO */,
  "mpan_supply_number" INTEGER /* MPAN Supply Number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the DNO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the DNO */,
  "dno_email" TEXT /* Email address of the DNO */,
  "dno_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the DNO */,
  "dno_url_complaints" TEXT /* URL for submitting customer complaints */,
  "dno_url_faq" TEXT /* URL for frequently asked questions */,
  "dno_status" TEXT /* Current status of the DNO (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "dno_license_number" TEXT /* License number issued by the regulator */,
  "dno_operating_since" TEXT /* Date the DNO started operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dno_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "dno_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNO operating in the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  "region_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the region manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_dno_id FOREIGN KEY ("dno_id") REFERENCES dnos ("dno_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_data" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI data point */,
  "dno_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNO the KPI data belongs to */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., customer satisfaction, fault response time) */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the KPI data was recorded */,
  "kpi_target" REAL /* Target value for the KPI */,
  "kpi_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the KPI */,
  "kpi_source" TEXT /* Source of the KPI data */,
  "kpi_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the KPI data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_data_dno_id FOREIGN KEY ("dno_id") REFERENCES dnos ("dno_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "dno_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNO the complaint is against */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was made */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who made the complaint */,
  "customer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., power outage, billing dispute) */,
  "complaint_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the complaint (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "complaint_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the complaint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_dno_id FOREIGN KEY ("dno_id") REFERENCES dnos ("dno_id")
)
column_names: Current status of the DNO (e.g., active, suspended, terminated)
License number issued by the regulator
ID of the DNO operating in the region
Area of the region in square kilometers
Email address of the region manager
